title: Cobblemon Mount Slot
description: Dedicated Mount Slot & Mount Whistle Item
body:
## Cobblemon Mount Slot

## Dedicated Mount Slot + Mount Whistle Item

**Cobblemon Mount Slot** is a mod that lets you mount your Pokémon with a Mount Whistle Item, take it, right click to mount/dismount, sneak + right click to remotely select any compatible mount Pokémon stored on your PC—all in a Pokémon slot separate from the six party slots!

In short, a mount mod that doesn't clutter your player team, accessible and configurable with just two key presses.

**Whistle Item :**
Sneak + Right Click > open the mount selection menu.
Right Click > Mount/dismount your Pokémon.

**Features**

- **Dedicated Mount Slot & HUD Mount Slot** > Visible HUD of your current select mount. _(Keybind option to hide/show the HUD)_
    
- **New Mount Whistle Item** > (No recipe for the moment, will think about it with community first) Item for calling mount and for selecting the mount you want, even if it's stored in your PC
    
- **Advanced Search Bar** > Pokemon name's / Box Name or Number / Shiny filter / multiple sorting order button (A-Z / Dex ID / Stats ..)
    

**Config**

*   **Mod Required:** Cobblemon 1.7.1 | 1.7.2 | 1.7.3
*   **Modloader** : Fabric
*   **Version** : 1.21.1
